Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn To Compel Further Discovery Responses From 1) Robert Renuio And 2) California Sierra Express, Inc
Off Calendar Aug-22-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances on this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling re Plaintiff KARLITA MALABED'S Motion to Compel Further Discovery Responses From 1) Robert Renuio and 2) California Sierra Express, Inc. Motion to compel further responses to Document Request is denied and granted to the following extent:
Category 3: Denied as to written attorney work product/privileged documents identified in defendant's privilege log; granted as to photographs and video of Plaintiff's vehicle, Plaintiff's home and Plaintiff.
Category 6: Granted as photographs and video of Plaintiff's vehicle, Plaintiff's home and Plaintiff. See Suezaki v. Superior Court (1962) 58 Cal. 2d 166, 172;
Category 7. Denied as to written reports of Investigator Jack Chan and Relna Kizzie; granted as photographs and video of Plaintiff's vehicle, Plaintiff's home and Plaintiff. Order to be signed. Judge Pro Tem: Steven B. Stein; Clerk L. Fong; matter not reported. (302/JPT)
